summary: Full scene flow audit: IntroCeltOS→Menu3DPC→{ParchmentPreRun|HubAntre}→BroceliandeForest3D→{MerlinGame|HubAntre}→EndRunScreen. 2 CRITICAL, 2 HIGH, 3 MEDIUM, 1 LOW, 5 PASS.

checks.name: IntroCeltOS → Menu3DPC transition
checks.detail: IntroCeltOS.gd:516 calls PixelTransition.transition_to('res://scenes/Menu3DPC.tscn'). Scene exists. Transition guards _transitioning flag. OK.

checks.name: Menu3DPC CONTINUER → profile load before HubAntre
checks.detail: menu_3d_pc.gd:1326 calls _glitch_transition('res://scenes/HubAntre.tscn') DIRECTLY without dispatching LOAD_PROFILE. SelectionSauvegarde.tscn is ORPHANED — not called from Menu3DPC. Profile/run_state never restored on CONTINUER path.

checks.name: BroceliandeForest3D post-merlin routing
checks.detail: broceliande_forest_3d.gd:9 GAME_SCENE='res://scenes/MerlinGame.tscn' (old architecture). After _merlin_found=true, routes to MerlinGame.tscn. This scene uses old merlin_game_controller.gd architecture. Should route to new HubAntre-based card flow or ParchmentPreRun.

checks.name: HubAntre → BroceliandeForest3D (run start)
checks.detail: HubAntre.gd:661 calls PixelTransition.transition_to(SCENE_FOREST). All 5 side destinations (Calendar, MenuOptions, ArbreDeVie, Collection, MapMonde) exist on disk. OK.

checks.name: EndRunScreen hub_requested → actual scene transition
checks.detail: GameFlowController._on_hub_requested() (game_flow_controller.gd:164) calls _set_phase(GamePhase.HUB) which only emits phase_changed signal — NO PixelTransition.transition_to() call. GameFlowController is NOT an autoload (not in project.godot). EndRunScreen.tscn does not instantiate GameFlowController. After EndRunScreen, there is no scene transition to HubAntre.

checks.name: IntroPersonalityQuiz + SceneRencontreMerlin deletion (director order)
checks.detail: Director answered q-20260414-005: 'Supprimer IntroPersonalityQuiz + SceneRencontreMerlin'. Both .tscn and .gd files still exist on disk. rencontre_dialogue.gd and rencontre_llm.gd are supporting scripts still in codebase.

checks.name: GameFlowController scene constants alignment
checks.detail: SCENE_HUB='res://scenes/HubScreen.tscn' (exists) but active hub is HubAntre.tscn. SCENE_RUN='res://scenes/Run3D.tscn' (exists but unused in main flow). SCENE_MENU='res://scenes/MenuPrincipal.tscn' (exists but orphaned). Architectural inconsistency.

checks.name: MerlinStore availability in BroceliandeForest3D
checks.detail: GameManager (autoload, first in list) creates MerlinStore in _ready() at game_manager.gd:675 and adds to /root/MerlinStore. BroceliandeForest3D._find_store() checks has_node('/root/MerlinStore') first — PASS. Fallback mode also handled gracefully.

checks.name: ParchmentPreRun back/escape path
checks.detail: parchment_pre_run.gd has no _unhandled_input ESC handler and no back button visible. Player has no way to return to Menu3DPC from ParchmentPreRun without killing the game.

checks.name: Dual end_run_screen.gd files
checks.detail: scripts/ui/end_run_screen.gd (EndRunScreenUI class, extends Node) vs scripts/run/end_run_screen.gd (EndRunScreen class, extends Control). EndRunScreen.tscn uses scripts/ui/ version. The scripts/run/ version has different signals and implementation. Maintenance risk.
